Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Of The Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MURPHY-TRUE, INC. DBA JIM MURPHY & ASSOCIATES' Motion For Stay Of The Action.

The court grants Plaintiff's unopposed motion for stay of this action pursuant to CCP 1281.5(a).

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
